name: Funny Bone
description: Funny Bone is a Skeleton dog who is one of the Undead core Skylanders in Skylanders: Trap Team. He has a St. Patrick's Day themed variant called Fortune Funny Bone.
biography: Funny Bone once lived on Punch Line Island – the funniest place in the Land of the Undead and home of the Eternal Chuckling Trees that magically make everyone laugh when the breeze tickles them. But after hearing stories of this, the evil Count Moneybone sent his minions to investigate if this magic could be used to make a 'Funny Bomb' that would render Skylands helpless with laughter. Funny Bone was in the middle of burying his neighbors' birthday cake on a breezeless day when the invaders arrived. Seeing their large axes, Funny Bone instantly knew that the Chuckling Trees were in danger. Without hesitation, he sprang into action, fighting off the minions and driving them from his humorous home. Now as a Skylander, Funny Bone delivers his own punch line to evil!
quote: I Have a Bone to Pick!
personality: Funny Bone is very protective. He always knows when danger's afoot. How does he know? Well, let's just say he gets a funny feeling about it.

story.content: Funny Bone once lived on Punch Line Island – the funniest place in the Land of the Undead and home of the Eternal Chuckling Trees that magically make everyone laugh when the breeze tickles them. But after hearing stories of this, the evil Count Moneybone sent his minions to investigate if this magic could be used to make a 'Funny Bomb' that would render Skylands helpless with laughter. Funny Bone was in the middle of burying his neighbors' birthday cake on a breezeless day when the invaders arrived. Seeing their large axes, Funny Bone instantly knew that the Chuckling Trees were in danger. Without hesitation, he sprang into action, fighting off the minions and driving them from his humorous home. Now as a Skylander, Funny Bone delivers his own punch line to evil!

content: I Have a Bone to Pick!
Fantasic hat! Ha ha, can I get a collar to match?
Come on, throw me a bone here!
Best name ever, no bones about it!

trivia: The Bone Discs are a reference to real life where a dog fetches a frisbee.
The Bone Saw attack resembles a monowheel: a vehicle with one wheel where the chair is inside.
His catchphrase is a play on the phrase 'I have a bone to pick with you'.
Funny Bone's name originates from a nerve from the human body, scientifically known as the Ulnar Nerve.
Funny Bone is one of the many Undead characters that can summon allies, others including Eye-Brawl, Krypt King, Rattle Shake, Cynder, Bat Spin, and Ghost Roaster.
He is one of the few playable canines in Skylanders (other canines include Hot Dog, Wolfgang, Slobber Trap and Flare Wolf).
Coincidentally, both he and Wolfgang are from the Undead element.
Funny Bone bears a resemblance to Horrifido from Dr. Zitbag's Transylvania Pet Shop.
In an interview during San Diego Comic Con 2014, I-Wei mispronouced Funny Bone's name as 'Bone Saw'.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Funny Bone's Soul Gem Preview (I Have A Bone To Pick)

gameplay: Funny Bone, being part of the Undead, possesses bone summoning abilities. He can fling out phantom frisbees to pummel enemies as his primary attack. Later upgrades allow him to chase after the disk and perform a slam attack once the disk is caught. Funny Bone also can charge up a spinning bone saw attack and grind into enemies. His third attack involves digging underground to bring up skeletal bone paws that attack enemies.

basic.name: Flying Bone Disc
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot a Flying Bone Disc.

basic.name: Bone Saw
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to dash forward and slice enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Bone Paws
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to raise Bone Paws from the ground which attack enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Disc Demon
basic_upgrades.content: Flying Bone Disc does extra damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Ferocious Fetch
basic_upgrades.content: Press and hold Attack 1 to chase after the Flying Bone Disc and release to fetch it.

basic_upgrades.name: Bump Up the Blades
basic_upgrades.content: Press and hold Attack 2 to charge a Bone Saw.

soulgems.name: Healing Paws
soulgems.content: Bone Paws pet Funny Bone to heal him.

abilities.name: Supercharged Saw
abilities.content: Press and hold Attack 2 to supercharge the Bone Saw.

abilities.name: Bone Paw Power
abilities.content: Dash towards a Bone Paw to supercharge the Bone Saw.

abilities.name: Head Case
abilities.content: Press and hold Attack 3 to summon a ghostly skull to devour enemies during the Bone Saw attack.

abilities.name: Flying Bone Doom
abilities.content: Flying Bone Discs now explode and do additional damage.

abilities.name: Ultimate FBD
abilities.content: Flying Bone Disc Slam affects a larger area.

abilities.name: Play Catch
abilities.content: Hit a Bone Paw with a Flying Bone Disc to play catch with other paws.
